[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 0001010 2
2 0000000 a
3 1100111 5
4 1101101 5
5 1100111 5
6 1101011 5
7 0001010 2

01 10 1100001 3
12 21 1101000 3
23 32 0001010 2 match 1 7
34 43 0001010 2 match 1 7
45 54 0000000 a match 2
56 65 0100100 2
67 76 1100101 4
70 07 1100111 5 match 3 5

02 20 1100010 3
13 31 0001001 2 match 0
24 42 0001010 2 match 1 7
35 53 0000000 a match 2
46 64 0000000 a match 2
57 75 0100100 2
